auth.usernameRuleEdgeSeparators: Cannot start or end with . or _
auth.passwordRuleNoEmailLocalPart: Does not contain your email username part

email.local_part_too_long: Email local part is too long
email.domain_invalid: Email domain must contain a dot

username.allowedChars: Username can only use letters, numbers, dots, and underscores
username.allowed_chars: Username can only use letters, numbers, dots, and underscores
username.edgeSeparators: Username cannot start or end with . or _
username.edge_separators: Username cannot start or end with . or _
username.consecutiveSeparators: Username cannot contain consecutive or mixed separators
username.consecutive_separators: Username cannot contain consecutive or mixed separators

password.lowercase: Password must include a lowercase letter
password.uppercase: Password must include an uppercase letter
password.special: Password must include a special character
password.noEmailLocalPart: Password must not contain the email username part
password.no_email_local_part: Password must not contain the email username part

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Your financial overview for this month.
dashboard.dailyTrendThisMonth: Daily trend from the 1st of this month to today
dashboard.upcomingRecurringSubtitle: Predicted charges scheduled for the coming weeks

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your profile and preferences.
settings.profileDesc: Account profile editing is not wired on backend yet.
settings.passwordDesc: Password change is not wired on backend yet.
settings.preferencesDesc: Language preference is saved in this browser.
settings.signOutConfirmDesc: You will be signed out and redirected to the sign-in page.

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.subtitle: Track, filter, and update your spending.
expenses.amountInvalid: Amount must be a positive whole number.
expenses.dateFuture: Date cannot be in the future.
expenses.startFuture: Start date cannot be in the future.
expenses.endFuture: End date cannot be in the future.
expenses.startAfterEnd: Start date cannot be after end date.
expenses.tooManyWait: Too many requests. Try again in {{seconds}} seconds.
expenses.tooManySoon: Too many requests. Try again soon.
expenses.budgetRequired: You cannot add an expense for {{category}}. Please create a budget first.
expenses.budgetRequiredForMonth: You cannot add an expense for {{category}} in {{month}}. Please create a budget for that month first.

title.length: Title must be between 3 and 32 characters.

recurring.cardDesc: Manage expenses that automatically repeat. (Max limit is 50)
recurring.addDialogDesc: Create a template that will automatically generate expenses on a schedule.
recurring.editDialogDesc: Update the details of this recurring template.
recurring.deleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this template? Future expenses will no longer be created automatically.
recurring.maxLimitReached: You can only have up to 50 active recurring expenses.
recurring.tooManySoon: Too many requests. Try again soon.
recurring.startDateBeforeCurrentMonth: Start date cannot be before the current month.
recurring.premiumDesc: Unlock Recurring Expenses and automate your monthly tracking with an active Premium subscription.
recurring.titleMinLength: Title must be at least 3 characters.
recurring.amountPositive: Amount must be a positive number.
recurring.budgetRequiredForStartMonth: Cannot create this recurring template for {{category}} because no budget exists for {{month}}. Create that budget first.

errors.recurring_expenses.premium_required: This feature requires a Premium subscription.
errors.recurring_expenses.not_owner: You do not have permission to modify this template.

budgets.title: Budgets
budgets.subtitle: Set your monthly spending limits for this month.
budgets.limitInvalid: Monthly limit must be a positive whole number.
budgets.deleteBlockedLinkedExpenses: This budget cannot be deleted because expenses already exist for this category and month. Remove or move those expenses first.
budgets.tooManyWait: Too many budget requests. Try again in {{seconds}} seconds.
budgets.tooManySoon: Too many budget requests. Try again soon.
budgets.emptyCurrentDesc: Create a budget for the current month or show history.
budgets.filtersDesc: Refine which budgets are visible and how they are ordered.
budgets.emptyFilteredDesc: Try changing filters or resetting them.
budgets.addDialogDesc: Select a category and set a monthly limit.

limit.invalid: Monthly limit must be a positive whole number.

month.invalid: Please select a valid budget month.
month.tooEarly: Budget month cannot be earlier than January 2020.
month.tooFar: Budget month is too far in the future.

target.required: Please select a valid budget first.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Understand your spending trends.
analytics.filtersDesc: Choose either a quick preset or a custom date range.
analytics.quickPresetsDesc: Presets always use the last N days up to today.
analytics.customRangeDesc: Provide both dates, from 2020-01-01 to today, with a maximum of 366 days (inclusive).
analytics.hintPickBoth: Pick both start and end date.
analytics.hintProvideBoth: Provide both start and end date.
analytics.hintTooEarly: Dates earlier than 2020-01-01 are not allowed.
analytics.hintEndFuture: End date cannot be in the future.
analytics.hintStartAfterEnd: Start date cannot be after end date.

export.title: Export
export.subtitle: Download your expenses as CSV.
export.cardDesc: Filters are optional. Export will include matching expenses only.
export.startTooEarly: Start date cannot be earlier than 2020-01-01.
export.endTooEarly: End date cannot be earlier than 2020-01-01.
export.startAfterEnd: Start date cannot be after end date.
export.tooManyWait: Too many export requests. Please try again in {{seconds}} seconds.
export.tooManySoon: Too many export requests. Please try again soon.
export.too_many_requests: Too many export requests. Please try again later.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you requested does not exist or the URL is incorrect.

categories_desc.Groceries: Only raw materials and unprepared food (not ready-to-eat)
categories_desc.Dining Out: Restaurants, cafes, food delivery, and ready-to-eat meals
categories_desc.Housing: Rent, mortgage, property taxes, and home maintenance
categories_desc.Utilities: Electricity, water, gas, internet, and phone bills
categories_desc.Subscriptions: Streaming services, gym, and recurring software fees
categories_desc.Transport: Fuel, public transit, taxi, parking, and car maintenance
categories_desc.Health: Doctor visits, pharmacy, insurance, and fitness related costs
categories_desc.Education: Tuition fees, courses, books, and development materials
categories_desc.Family & Events: Gifts, ceremonies, charity, and supporting relatives
categories_desc.Entertainment: Cinema, hobbies, travel, and leisure activities
categories_desc.Installments & Debt: Loan repayments, installments, and credit card debt
categories_desc.Business / Work: Client meetings, office supplies, software tools, and work travel
